svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="第 1 页" id="vqeX7xhq8-KuWHmK5gYL"> <mxGraphModel dx="1022" dy="572" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=none;" value="<span style="font-family: &quot;Comic Sans MS&quot;; font-size: 44px; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: center; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial; float: none; display: inline !important;"><font style="color: rgb(10, 112, 163);">T</font>ransactions on&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Comic Sans MS&quot;; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center;"><font style="color: rgb(10, 112, 163);">D</font>ependable and&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;Comic Sans MS&quot;; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center;"><font style="color: rgb(10, 112, 163);">S</font>ecure <font style="color: rgb(10, 112, 163);">C</font>omputing</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="610" x="40" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="530.87" x="40" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
